title: funcy's screenshot plus
description: A fabric mod that automatically organizes your Minecraft screenshots into folders by world and server.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/842e03ca4dd6750efa684dffe01eb2127b18857c_0.webp)

Tired of Minecraft dumping all your screenshots into one chaotic folder?
funcys's Screenshot+ saves your in-game screenshots into organized folders like:
<details>
<summary>Sorting Preview:</summary>

```
screenshots/
├── singleplayer/
│   └── hardcore_world/
│       └── Screenshot_2025-06-15_14.05.32.png
└── multiplayer/
    └── play.funcybear.com/
        └── Screenshot_2025-06-15_14.07.10.png
```

</details>
